{{CargoRelic
|name=Xuanyuan Compass Chariot
|class_id=21441
|rank=SSS
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Mythic fog-breaker from the Yellow Emperor’s war. Magnetized figurines pointed the way to victory.
|fame=66
|art=55
|fth=71
|civ=63
|tech=107
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>All Minion HP +0.6%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop HP +360
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>All Minion HP +0.8%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop HP +480
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>All Minion HP +1%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop HP +600
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>All Minion HP +1.4%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop HP +840
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>All Minion HP +1.8%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop HP +1080
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>All Minion HP +2.4%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop HP +1440
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>All Minion HP +2.4%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop HP +1440<br>Snail Leadership +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Goldfish skill III.png|50px]]Place in Goldfish Biozilla: In Species War, Troop Fire DMG +60
|skill2=[[File:Goldfish skill III.png|50px]]Place in Goldfish Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion ATK +9%
|skill3=[[File:Goldfish skill III.png|50px]]Place in Goldfish Biozilla: In Species War, Troop DMG toward heroes +6%
}}
